article_title: Driving On Right Side of Roadway, Overtaking & Passing, Etc
text: The operator of a vehicle overtaking, from behind, a bicycle proceeding on the same side of a roadway shall pass to the left of such bicycle at a safe distance until safely clear thereof.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 25. Driving On Right Side of Roadway, Overtaking & Passing, Etc
##### § 1122-A — Overtaking a bicycle

The operator of a vehicle overtaking, from behind, a bicycle proceeding on the same side of a roadway shall pass to the left of such bicycle at a safe distance until safely clear thereof.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
